notes: rebalance threshold reduced from 1000 to 200 for paper mode (0.2% of 100K)
sharpe_notes: rf=0.0: stablecoin DeFi portfolio — benchmark is holding USDC, not T-bills. Early-period grace for first 60 days uses softer threshold=-2.0 to avoid artefacts from low-vol tracks.
red_flags_notes: Bootstrap/fallback данные (fallback_used=true или sources=[bootstrap]) не триггерят kill_switch. Только живые флаги считаются.
